title: boerhavia elegans
intro: Boerhavia elegans, also known as Red Sage or Devil's Horsewhip, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Boerhavia elegans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support kidney function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
